description: A photograph depicting an industrial landscape featuring a large standing water body on the left and a conveyor belt system in the foreground on the right, under a clear blue sky. The conveyor belt, loaded with light-coloured granular material resembling gravel, runs parallel to the water's edge. A lamp post is visible in the background near the conveyor belt. The image illustrates a typical scenario for "Standing water bodies of extractive industrial sites," which are water bodies related to active quarries, gravel pits, or mining activities. The copyright "©European Union, 2012" and "LUCAS" are visible in the bottom left corner.
